message:
ci: bump actions versions (independent of dependabot#40)

Applies the same bumps as PR #40, but committed independently per
project contribution policy (PRs are never merged; ideas are
reimplemented).

- Swatinem/rust-cache 2.8.2 -> 2.9.1 (hash regression fix)
- dawidd6/action-download-artifact 14 -> 20
- actions/github-script 8 -> 9 (major: node20 -> node24)
- actions/upload-artifact 6 -> 7 (major: artifacts immutable)
- actions/download-artifact 7 -> 8 (major)
- anchore/sbom-action 0.22.2 -> 0.24.0
- actions/attest-build-provenance 3.2.0 -> 4.1.0 (major)
- softprops/action-gh-release 2.5.0 -> 3.0.0 (major)
- actions/setup-node 6.2.0 -> 6.4.0

Closes #40.

files.patch:
@@ -31,7 +31,7 @@ jobs:
         uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
 
       - name: Cache cargo registry and build
-        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@779680da715d629ac1d338a641029a2f4372abb5 # v2.8.2
+        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@c19371144df3bb44fab255c43d04cbc2ab54d1c4 # v2.9.1
         with:
           cache-on-failure: true
           key: benchmarks-${{ runner.os }}-${{ runner.arch }}-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
@@ -45,7 +45,7 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Download baseline (for PRs)
         if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
-        uses: dawidd6/action-download-artifact@5c98f0b039f36ef966fdb7dfa9779262785ecb05 # v14
+        uses: dawidd6/action-download-artifact@8305c0f1062bb0d184d09ef4493ecb9288447732 # v20
         with:
           workflow: benchmarks.yml
           branch: ${{ github.base_ref }}
@@ -118,7 +118,7 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Comment on PR
         if: github.event_name == 'pull_request' && github.event.pull_request.head.repo.full_name == github.repository
-        uses: actions/github-script@ed597411d8f924073f98dfc5c65a23a2325f34cd # v8
+        uses: actions/github-script@3a2844b7e9c422d3c10d287c895573f7108da1b3 # v9.0.0
         with:
           github-token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
           script: |
@@ -179,7 +179,7 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Upload baseline artifact
         if: github.event_name == 'push' && (github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || github.ref == 'refs/heads/master')
-        uses: actions/upload-artifact@b7c566a772e6b6bfb58ed0dc250532a479d7789f # v6.0.0
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@043fb46d1a93c77aae656e7c1c64a875d1fc6a0a # v7.0.1
         with:
           name: criterion-baseline
           path: criterion-baseline/

@@ -32,7 +32,7 @@ jobs:
           components: rustfmt, clippy
 
       - name: Cache cargo registry and build
-        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@779680da715d629ac1d338a641029a2f4372abb5 # v2.8.2
+        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@c19371144df3bb44fab255c43d04cbc2ab54d1c4 # v2.9.1
 
       - name: Check formatting
         run: cargo fmt --all -- --check
@@ -71,7 +71,7 @@ jobs:
           if (Get-Command ssh-keygen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { ssh-keygen -h } else { Write-Host "ssh-keygen not found" }
 
       - name: Cache cargo registry and build
-        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@779680da715d629ac1d338a641029a2f4372abb5 # v2.8.2
+        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@c19371144df3bb44fab255c43d04cbc2ab54d1c4 # v2.9.1
         with:
           key: ${{ runner.os }}-${{ runner.arch }}-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
 
@@ -97,7 +97,7 @@ jobs:
           components: rustfmt, clippy
 
       - name: Cache cargo registry and build
-        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@779680da715d629ac1d338a641029a2f4372abb5 # v2.8.2
+        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@c19371144df3bb44fab255c43d04cbc2ab54d1c4 # v2.9.1
         with:
           workspaces: examples
           key: examples-${{ runner.os }}-${{ runner.arch }}-${{ hashFiles('examples/Cargo.lock') }}

@@ -56,7 +56,7 @@ jobs:
           targets: ${{ matrix.target }}
 
       - name: Cache cargo registry and build
-        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@779680da715d629ac1d338a641029a2f4372abb5 # v2.8.2
+        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@c19371144df3bb44fab255c43d04cbc2ab54d1c4 # v2.9.1
         with:
           key: release-${{ matrix.target }}-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
 
@@ -78,7 +78,7 @@ jobs:
           Copy-Item "target/${{ matrix.target }}/release/${{ env.BINARY_NAME }}.exe" "dist/${{ matrix.artifact_name }}.exe"
 
       - name: Upload artifact
-        uses: actions/upload-artifact@b7c566a772e6b6bfb58ed0dc250532a479d7789f # v6.0.0
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@043fb46d1a93c77aae656e7c1c64a875d1fc6a0a # v7.0.1
         with:
           name: ${{ matrix.artifact_name }}
           path: dist/*
@@ -97,7 +97,7 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
 
       - name: Download all artifacts
-        uses: actions/download-artifact@37930b1c2abaa49bbe596cd826c3c89aef350131 # v7.0.0
+        uses: actions/download-artifact@3e5f45b2cfb9172054b4087a40e8e0b5a5461e7c # v8.0.1
         with:
           path: artifacts
 
@@ -118,18 +118,18 @@ jobs:
         run: echo "VERSION=${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
 
       - name: Generate SBOM
-        uses: anchore/sbom-action@28d71544de8eaf1b958d335707167c5f783590ad # v0.22.2
+        uses: anchore/sbom-action@e22c389904149dbc22b58101806040fa8d37a610 # v0.24.0
         with:
           path: release/
           output-file: release/sbom.spdx.json
 
       - name: Attest build provenance
-        uses: actions/attest-build-provenance@96278af6caaf10aea03fd8d33a09a777ca52d62f # v3.2.0
+        uses: actions/attest-build-provenance@a2bbfa25375fe432b6a289bc6b6cd05ecd0c4c32 # v4.1.0
         with:
           subject-path: release/*
 
       - name: Create GitHub Release
-        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@a06a81a03ee405af7f2048a818ed3f03bbf83c7b # v2.5.0
+        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@b4309332981a82ec1c5618f44dd2e27cc8bfbfda # v3.0.0
         with:
           name: Release ${{ steps.version.outputs.VERSION }}
           draft: false
@@ -153,7 +153,7 @@ jobs:
         uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
 
       - name: Cache cargo registry
-        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@779680da715d629ac1d338a641029a2f4372abb5 # v2.8.2
+        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@c19371144df3bb44fab255c43d04cbc2ab54d1c4 # v2.9.1
         with:
           key: publish

@@ -41,7 +41,7 @@ jobs:
           targets: wasm32-unknown-unknown
 
       - name: Cache cargo registry and build
-        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@779680da715d629ac1d338a641029a2f4372abb5 # v2.8.2
+        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@c19371144df3bb44fab255c43d04cbc2ab54d1c4 # v2.9.1
         with:
           key: wasm-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
 
@@ -83,7 +83,7 @@ jobs:
           done
 
       - name: Upload WASM artifacts
-        uses: actions/upload-artifact@b7c566a772e6b6bfb58ed0dc250532a479d7789f # v6.0.0
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@043fb46d1a93c77aae656e7c1c64a875d1fc6a0a # v7.0.1
         with:
           name: wasm-packages
           path: pkg/
@@ -103,7 +103,7 @@ jobs:
           targets: wasm32-unknown-unknown
 
       - name: Cache cargo registry and build
-        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@779680da715d629ac1d338a641029a2f4372abb5 # v2.8.2
+        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@c19371144df3bb44fab255c43d04cbc2ab54d1c4 # v2.9.1
         with:
           key: wasm-test-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
 
@@ -129,12 +129,12 @@ jobs:
       contents: read
       id-token: write
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/download-artifact@37930b1c2abaa49bbe596cd826c3c89aef350131 # v7.0.0
+      - uses: actions/download-artifact@3e5f45b2cfb9172054b4087a40e8e0b5a5461e7c # v8.0.1

           name: wasm-packages

-      - uses: actions/setup-node@6044e13b5dc448c55e2357c09f80417699197238 # v6.2.0

         with:
